t_ch: 天才俱乐部#64原始博士，没有人知道他的真名，但他犯下的罪行寰宇皆知，其中最骇人听闻的便是「返祖实验」。
t_en: Member #64 of the Genius Society, Dr. Primitive. No one knows his real name, but his atrocities are infamous throughout the cosmos. The most horrifying one of all has to be his atavistic experiment.

t_ch: 被卷入其中的数十个世界，在他到来前大多都是繁盛的星际文明，而他离去后，那些星球就只剩下了退化的智慧。
t_en: The dozens of worlds he caught up in this experiment were mostly home to prosperous interstellar civilizations, but every single one of these planets was reduced to a regressed form of intelligence by the time he was done with them.

t_ch: 智械变回机器、扎兹卡变回飞鸟，而最常见的人类文明，无一例外落入了同一种惨状：数以亿计的猿猴，在曾经名为「家园」的废墟上游荡。
t_en: Intellitrons deteriorated into mere machines, Zatzkas regressed into birds, and even the most ubiquitous human civilizations were subjected to the same fate: Millions of apes and monkeys now wander amidst the ruins that they once called home.

t_ch: 如果此事当真，必须尽快通知星穹列车和家族，这不是我们能应对的危机。一位不择手段的「智识」令使…一着不慎，后果不堪设想。
t_en: If Dr. Primitive is indeed behind this, we must alert the Astral Express and The Family at once. We won't be able to avert this crisis on our own. Facing such an amoral Emanator of Erudition... even the slightest of negligence could bring unimaginable consequences.

t_ch: 百分正确的分析。但依在下愚见，此刻还不是向同谐•幕府求援的时机。
t_en: Your analysis is accurate. However, in my humble opinion, now may not be the best time to call the Harmony Shogunate for aid.

t_ch: 《银河忍法帖》有云：张网捕鱼，鱼死网破。如今御猿•邪忍仍未现身，敌我皆在暗处，不宜打树•惊猴。
t_en: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "When the net is cast for a catch, ready yourself to land a fish or forgo your net." With Evil Ninja Osaru lurking in the shadows and our locations not yet compromised, I suggest laying low to avoid alerting the monkeys.

t_ch: 在下已委托银枪•修罗殿下深入禁地，一探虚实。敬请放心，银枪•修罗殿下乃是一骑当千的大•忍侠，定能完成任务。
t_en: Rest assured, I've delegated Silvergun Shura to investigate the forbidden ground. Being the chivalrous and exceptional Ninja Hero he is, I have faith Silvergun Shura will accomplish the assigned mission.

t_ch: 至于我等…眼下更重要的是折纸村一众忍徒的性命。他们手无缚猴之力，我等身为忍侠，若不救眼前人，何以救天下？
t_en: At this juncture, our priority is to rescue the ninja initiates of Paperfold Town. What Ninja Heroes would we be if left those defenseless initiates to the monkeys? If we don't rescue those before us, how can we hope to save the world?

t_ch: …确实不能放着学生们的安危不管。
t_en: ...Indeed, we must not leave the students to fend for themselves.

t_ch: 哦，终于找到你们了，亲爱的演员们！
t_en: There you are. I've finally found you, my beloved talents!

t_ch: 竟然是…虾蟇•忍者？
t_en: It's... Ninja Gama?

t_ch: 哦！这位演员的台词还真有意思。
t_en: Oh? I see this actor is creative with her words.

t_ch: 芮克先生？有什么事吗？
t_en: Mr. Reca? Do you need our help with something?

t_ch: 是这样的，谐乐学院正在拍摄校庆宣传片，但一直没能找到蕉师满意的演员，所以我就来物色更有潜力的同学了——
t_en: Ah, yes. Charmony Academy is filming a promotional video for their anniversary, but the BananAdvisor hasn't found anyone that makes the cut. That's why I'm here: To recruit students with greater acting potential—

t_ch: 比如你，过往精彩的大腕儿！以及你，万众瞩目的巨星！还有这位…个性十足的演员！请一定要赏光参演！
t_en: Like you, a big shot with a brilliant past! And you, a superstar that everyone will have their eyes on! And this... actress with personality! Please join us in the performance!

t_ch: 毕竟谐乐蕉师可是睡蕉小猴的缔造者之一，只有各位青年才俊才能满足她挑剔的目光。
t_en: Considering how Charmony BananAdvisor's a creator of the Slumbernana Monkey, I believe only young and talented people such as yourselves will be the ones to catch her discerning eye.

t_ch: 明白了。感谢芮克先生推荐，我们会去看看的。
t_en: I see. Thank you for thinking so highly of us, Mr. Reca. We'll make sure to drop by.

t_ch: 这就对了！上课地点在摄影教室，我们一会儿见。
t_en: That's the way! We'll be at the photography studio. See you later.

t_ch: 蕉、蕉蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana, bana, bana...

t_ch: 蕉蕉，蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana, bana...

t_ch: 这两只睡蕉小猴似乎正在交流些什么，但也有可能只是在发出无意义的*蕉声*。
t_en: The two Slumbernana Monkey seem to be communicating about something, but it's also possible that they're just making meaningless Banagibberish sounds.

t_ch: 可叹！请再忍耐一番。在下定会击败御猿•邪忍，令二位恢复忍者之身。
t_en: How lamentable you are! Please, bear with me for now. I vow to defeat Evil Ninja Osaru and restore your ninja forms.

t_ch: 蕉，蕉蕉！
t_en: Bana, bana!

t_ch: 不及格，不及格蕉。你完全没表现睡蕉小猴五分慵懒、三分可爱、两分俏皮的感觉蕉。
t_en: Fail, fail, fail. You didn't capture Slumbernana Monkey's five parts laziness, three parts cuteness, and two parts playfulness at all!

t_ch: 谐乐蕉师，人家已经尽力了——可扮演猴子也太难了吧！
t_en: But I'm already doing the best I can, Charmony BananAdvisor! It's so hard to play a monkey!

t_ch: 哎，真让猴失望，要不还是换演员吧，如果没有对小猴炙热的爱意，演技再好也没用蕉。
t_en: An utter disappointment to the monkeys. Maybe we should change the cast. Acting skills alone won't cut it. They need to adore Slumbernana with every fiber of their being, bana!

t_en: Charmony BananAdvisor, I have a few candidates here. Perhaps they will be to your liking?

t_ch: 是说我们吗？
t_en: Is he talking about us?

t_ch: 盛会巨星来了！
t_en: Festive Superstar's ready to roll!

t_ch: 我老爱小猴了。
t_en: Ooh, I absolutely adore monkeys!

t_ch: 哦，看着资质不错啊。蕉蕉蕉，希望你们不会让蕉师失望。
t_en: Oh? They seem to have potential. Bana bana! I hope you don't leave me disappointed.

t_en: ...Hmm, is this evil fiendling a dragon or a monkey?

t_en: Monkey—no, I mean, I'm Charmony BananAdvisor!

t_en: Bana tsk, your earlier performance was disappointing enough.

t_ch: 矛盾的反派需要精湛的演技，自由的台词更需深厚的功底，这是难度最高的角色，非你莫属！
t_en: The role of a conflicted villain requires sublime acting, and improvised lines further demand a robust foundation in the art. You are the only one who can take on this most challenging role.

t_ch: 各位，准备好了就开始，副导演的摄像机已经迫不及待了。
t_en: We'll begin once everyone's ready. The assistant director's camera is ready to roll.

t_ch: 如无意外，龙•邪祟也会在这「课堂」上露出马脚。

t_en: Are you guys ready to start?

t_en: All monkeys share the same line. There's no point in rehearsing.

t_ch: 在下得认真构思，该如何在念白中彰显缭乱•忍道呢……
t_en: I ought to sit down and conceptualize how to incorporate and play up the Way of the Dazzling Ninja in my narration...

t_en: How should I incorporate and play up the Way of the Dazzling Ninja in my narration...?

t_ch: 谐乐蕉师一定也会露出破绽，小心行事。
t_en: Charmony BananAdvisor is bound to slip up like the others. Exercise caution.

t_en: Bana—Oh, it's you, Superstar. I'm so envious of you guys! Being cast in Mr. Reca's film is my ultimate dream...

t_ch: 你可以的。
t_en: You'll get there.

t_en: Nanabloom-chan kept playing "The Slumbernana Song" on her phone over and over again — given past experiences, you think it's best to leave her be.

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉蕉……
t_en: Ba na na na... Ba na na na...

t_ch: 芭蕉花酱一遍又一遍播放着手机中的《睡蕉之歌》——鉴于之前的经历，你觉得还是离她远点比较好。
t_en: Nanabloom-chan kept playing "The Slumbernana Song" on her phone over and over again — given past experiences, you think it's best to leave her be.

t_ch: 蕉…蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana, bana bana, bana...

t_en: Hello...?

t_ch: 请问…
t_en: Um, excuse me...

t_ch: 蕉！
t_en: Bana!

t_ch: 蕉…蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana, bana bana, bana...

t_ch: 他们扭头看向你，但口中只有*蕉声*。他们的眼神中充满了澄澈的善意，应该已经完全进入了睡蕉小猴的角色——真是一群称职的演员。
t_en: They turned to look at you, but only Banagibberish came from their mouths. Their eyes were filled with pure goodwill, fully immersed in their roles as Slumbernana Monkeys — truly a dedicated group of actors.

t_en: Bana, bana bana, bana...

t_en: Dreamscapes glowin', gold halls flowin', a legendary feast's about to get goin'.

t_en: Then I'll continue— From the hearts of men, monsters arise, the banquet turns to scorched earth, laughter to cries, a passing hero lends a hand, ha — no surprise.

t_en: Fail! If I hear one more swear word from you, you'll be penalized for breaking the school rules!

t_ch: 蕉，蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana, bana...

t_ch: 不慎坠入低谷，身负战败之辱。大师到访此处，侠客倾耳拭目——
t_en: The hero's down and out, defeat hangin' in the air, but in walks the master with wisdom to share—

t_ch: 蕉，蕉蕉。
t_en: Bana, bana bana.

t_ch: …蕉蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉蕉。「蕉蕉蕉蕉」，蕉蕉。
t_en: ..."Bana bana," bana.

t_ch: 你…啧，你的台词倒没什么问题，下一句！
t_en: You... Tsk, your lines are fine. Go on, next line!

t_ch: （丹恒，辛苦你了……）
t_en: (Thanks for quenching her wrath, Dan Heng...)

t_ch: 侠客将此箴言铭诸肺腑，褪色的宝剑再度锋芒毕露。昨日告负不妨今夕重振旗鼓，扬眉拔剑再度讨伐狂妄恶徒！
t_en: The master's wisdom resonates to his core, the hero's blade sharper than ever before. Yesterday's loser is back in the fight, fight or flight, evildoers think twice.

t_ch: （又到我的台词了，这次要说出「挑衅小猴的话」……）
t_en: (It's my turn again. This time I'll say something to taunt Brave Monkey...)

t_ch: 说出挑衅的话
t_en: Taunt Brave Monkey.

t_ch: 杂鱼小猴，又来讨打啦？不会真有猴子这么不知轻重吧？不会吧不会吧？
t_en: Aww, look who's back another whooping? You really don't know when to stop, do you? Is that it, rinky-dink dink dink monkey???

t_ch: 虽然是挺欠揍的…但人设错了，不及格！
t_en: It's taunting, alright... But you're channeling the wrong archetype! Fail!

t_ch: 说出激怒对方的忍•真言
t_en: Speak the ninja mantra with a provocative twist

t_ch: 你的顽强真是让人佩服，但再顽强的废物还是废物。我的实力是你的几何倍数， 立刻跪伏否则粉身碎骨！
t_en: Your grit's worth a nod, but you're no less of a dud. Better learn how to flow or get lost in the flood. With me spittin' power, a zillion times yours, gonna have to concede or crawl home on all fours!

t_ch: 何其凶残！阁下的忍•真言已进入半步•令使之境了。
t_en: Stellarly brutal! You've attained the skills of a Semi-Emanator when it comes to reciting the ninja mantra!

t_ch: 不及格！别再把音乐课的内容带进表演课了！
t_en: Fail! We're in an acting class! Stop applying whatever you learned in music!

t_ch: 挑衅地爆粗
t_en: Provoke with swear words

t_ch: 这不是上次的小*银河粗口*吗？又来找*银河粗口*了？我*银河粗口*！
t_en: Aren't you that *cosmic profanity* trash I pummeled last time? Back here looking for your *cosmic profanity* again? See how I *cosmic profanity* you!

t_ch: 这番气势…银枪•修罗殿下的言语未被封印时，也当如阁下一般勇猛吧。
t_en: This assertive aggression... Silvergun Shura's words, before they were sealed, must have been just as fierce as yours.

t_ch: 真没素质！不及格啊！！
t_en: Uncouth! Through and through! Fail!!!

t_ch: 蕉，蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana, bana...

t_ch: 唉，不及格！不及格！不及格！芮克先生，停止拍摄吧，他们根本没有扮演小猴的天份蕉！
t_en: Ugh. Fail! Fail! Fail! Stop filming, Mr. Reca. None of them are cut out for portraying our beloved monkeys, bana!

t_ch: 等等，请再给我一次机会——
t_en: Wait! Please, just give me one more—

t_ch: 同学，这世上没有那么多机会。
t_en: Second chances don't come around that often, girl.

t_ch: 求求您了，出演芮克先生的电影是我的梦想，请不要在他面前这么说……
t_en: Please, I'm begging you! Being in one of Mr. Reca's films is my dream! Um, don't say that...

t_ch: 在下认为伎乐忍徒的演技全无不妥，是阁下太过吹毛求疵了。
t_en: If you want my opinion, there's nothing amiss with Ninja Initiate Gigaku's acting. In fact, you are being overly critical of her.

t_ch: 你觉得？你是给她打分的蕉师？还是为她提供工作的导演？能在课堂上决定学生价值的当然只有我蕉。
t_en: You think? Are you the BananAdvisor who grades her work, or the director who assigns her roles? It's up to me to assess my students' worth in this class!

t_ch: 芮克先生，停止拍摄吧，我们该换演员了。
t_en: Let's stop filming, Mr. Reca. We need to swap out the actors.

t_ch: 停止拍摄？不不不，这出戏还没结束呢——
t_en: Stop? No, not yet. The show still isn't over—

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana bana, bana...

t_ch: （又来了，是梦里的感觉……）
t_en: (Not this again. It feels like I'm in a dream...)

t_ch: {NICKNAME}？你没事吧蕉…蕉？
t_en: {NICKNAME}? Are you alright—ba... bana?

t_ch: 蕉？蕉蕉蕉，看来*蕉学*开始起效了呀。
t_en: Bana? Bana, bana! Looks like the banacademics is taking effect.

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
t_en: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

t_ch: 恭喜各位同学，你们马上就能成为合格的演员了，感谢睡蕉小猴吧——
t_en: Congratulations, students! Thanks to Slumbernana Monkey, you'll soon be qualified actors!
Bana...

t_ch: 果不其然，这也是邪忍的陷阱呐。
t_en: Just as I thought, this is yet another snare laid down by the Evil Ninja.

t_ch: 嗯？你怎么还这么清醒？真是个不可*蕉化*的差生啊。
t_en: Hmm? Why are you still lucid? Truly an incorrigible student!

t_ch: 龙•邪祟殿下，与在下的缭乱•忍法相比，此等妖术不过是雕虫小技——
t_en: Nay, dinosaur fiendling. Your feeble sorcery stands no chance against my Dazzling Ninjutsu!

t_ch: 让在下来唤醒大家吧！缭乱•空手道•正气断惑手刀•连打式！
t_en: Watch me snap everyone back to their senses! Hi-yah! Dazzling Palm: Righteous Chop!

t_ch: ——雷霆激响之声
t_en: — A rumble of thunder

t_ch: 霸道的忍力又一次倾注在你的眉心，将你从沉沦中唤醒。从刚刚的击打声判断，台上的每位忍者都受到了帮助，哪怕是路过的睡蕉小猴都要吃上一记手刀。
t_en: The overpowering ninja force surged into your forehead once more, snapping you out of your daze. Judging by the recent sounds of impact, every ninja on stage received assistance, even the passing Slumbernana Monkey got a swift chop.

t_ch: 真的好疼！
t_en: Ow, that hurts!

t_ch: 又清醒了。
t_en: Oh, I've regained my senses.

t_ch: 一天被打两次了！
t_en: Two "chops" in one day!

t_ch: 好痛…发、发生什么事了？
t_en: Ow... Wh—What happened?

t_ch: 《银河忍法帖》有云：「忍心当如磐石，凌轹之下不离析，谰言之风难磨蚀。」
t_en: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "The stone heart of a ninja is immune to pressure, immune to lies, come wind, rain, or shine."

t_ch: 伎乐忍徒，务必要坚守自我啊。
t_en: Never forget who you truly are, Ninja Initiate Gigaku.

t_ch: 这、这是又换了一场戏吗？是忍者电影？
t_en: A—Are we onto another film now? Is this going to be about ninjas?

t_ch: 不，现在正是最精彩的桥段！只不过演员发生了一些小小的变化——谐乐蕉师，现在由你来饰演反派。
t_en: No, but we've come to the climax of the film! Just a small swap among the roles... Charmony BananAdvisor, you're up for the villain this time.

t_ch: 搞什么！我说了关机、关机！
t_en: What are you even... I said to stop filming! STOP, FILMING!

t_ch: CUT——有我在的片场，我就是导演！来吧诸位演员，用高潮的*打戏*来拯救这部烂片吧。
t_en: Cut—! When you're on my set, I AM the director! Come on now, dear actors, let's salvage this lousy film with an electrifying fight scene!

t_ch: 正合在下心意。
t_en: Great ninja minds think alike.

t_ch: 赞成。
t_en: I agree.

t_ch: 还是打架适合我
t_en: Fighting suits me better.

t_ch: 终于不用当反派了
t_en: Yay, I'm no longer the villain!

t_ch: 最爱演的一集！
t_en: Yes! My favorite kind of episode!

t_ch: 蕉…你们这群差生，既然执意要破坏课堂，那就必须进行*蕉正*了——助蕉们，跟我上！
t_en: Bana grr... If you unruly students insist on disrupting my class, you're in for some corrective bananishment! Teach them a lesson, Assistananas!

t_ch: 此刻——侠客领会了忍者的觉悟，不会再因恶语而却步。
t_en: From this very moment... Back down, retreat? The hero says "never" — the way of the ninja burning in their heart forever.

t_ch: 忍者的苦无沾染邪祟血污，自由的学府斩断一切约束！
t_en: With fiendling blood the sword of justice will be stained, as the school casts off every shackle every chain!

t_ch: 真的假的，我也要上吗！？
t_en: Hey, do I really have to fight too?

t_ch: 恶语伤人的邪祟已落败，残虐不仁的奸计被破坏。侠客抹去了学府的祸灾，宴会重拾往日的多彩——
t_en: Wicked tongues, wicked lies, all of them destroyed, say goodbye to evil plots, strategies and ploys. The life of the party, savior of the school, let's hear it for the hero, here to keep it cool...

t_ch: 伎乐忍徒，说出最后的台词吧。
t_en: Ninja Initiate Gigaku, deliver your final line.

t_ch: 蕉…不对！卑劣的厉鬼，你的恶语没有打倒伎乐忍徒！忍者大胜利！
t_en: Bana—scratch that! Evil thing! Your vile words cannot bring Ninja Initiate Gigaku down! It's a victory for us ninjas, hurray!

t_ch: 这家伙也停止运作了，真的就像有人在背后操纵一样。
t_en: This one has ceased operating as well. It's as if some unseen puppeteer cut its strings.

t_ch: 这次我可收手了。
t_en: I went easy this time.

t_ch: 不能怪我了吧？
t_en: No pinning the blame on me this time!

t_ch: 美梦剧团质量太差了。
t_en: Sweet Dreams Troupe gotta up their game.

t_ch: 所以，虾蟇•忍者，现在阁下能将一切阐明了吗？
t_en: Ninja Gama, can you kindly enlighten us on the proceedings thus far?

t_ch: 各位演员也意识到了啊，那就由我来翻开剧本的下一页吧，关于这所折纸大学发生的罪恶——
t_en: So, you actors have caught on... Let me reveal the next act in the plot then. We'll be exploring the misdeeds going down at Paperfold University...

t_ch: 各位演员，听说过「模因病毒」吗？
t_en: Alright now, dear actors. Ever heard of a memetic virus?

t_ch: 这就是「睡蕉小猴」的真面目？
t_en: Is that what Slumbernana Monkey is?

t_ch: 没错。模因污染是一种传播现象，它会影响认知的信息粒子，把受污染者对特定事物的感官变成另一种模样，就像是影片的特效。
t_en: You're right. Memetic corruption comes about from the dissemination of data. It alters particles of information picked up by the cognitive module, skewing the sensory perception of certain objects in those that have been corrupted. Much like special effects in a film.

t_ch: 话语、音乐、视频…这些东西都是传播媒介，人类天然对未知的事物带有好奇心，而模因病毒便会趁虚而入。
t_en: Words, songs, videos... these are all mediums of transmission. Humans naturally have a curiosity for the unknown, and memetic viruses take advantage of this.

t_ch: 即便在现实中，模因污染也能改变一个人的思想。而在这梦境的世界——便会催生出将人变作猿猴的噩梦。
t_en: Memetic corruption is known to influence one's thoughts even in the real world. And in the Dreamscape, they catalyze nightmares that corrupt humans into monkeys.

t_ch: 所以，邪忍先让邪祟们散布装饰过的媒介，以娱乐为掩饰，在诸位忍徒心中植入邪术的种子。
t_en: Hence, the evil ninja instructs the evil fiendlings to spread through media, masking it as entertainment to implant the seeds of dark sorcery in the hearts of the ninja initiates.

t_ch: 又谋篡了师长之位，对诸位忍徒的心智施以凌虐，使他们心中的邪术发作。
t_en: Misappropriating the role of actual educators gave them the perfect chance to mangle the minds of innocent ninja initiates, only to hasten the growth of those fiendish seeds they sowed.

t_ch: 如此循环往复，折纸村的忍徒就会被邪祟同化，成为邪忍的傀儡…真是一场无心、无情、无慈悲的大阴谋！
t_en: And so all ninja initiates of Paperfold Town will succumb to fiendishness, becoming puppets of the evil ninja... What a dispiteous, degenerate, and dastardly ploy!

t_ch: 呃，你们在说什么呢？这也是剧本上的台词吗？
t_en: Uh... What are you talking about? Are these lines in the script?

t_ch: 这位演员的台词有些晦涩，但剧情走向大体没错。
t_en: This actor's lines may be somewhat cryptic, but yes, the general plot direction is on point.

t_ch: 既然虾蟇•忍者早已洞察真相，为何迟迟不行动呢？
t_en: But Ninja Gama, why are you bogged down by inaction when you've long realized the truth behind their pretense?

t_ch: 我只是一介过路导演，怎么敢轻举妄动？要战胜可怕的反派，还得仰赖各位身份显贵的主角。
t_en: I'm just a director that stumbled upon a sinister plan. A reckless move on my part can bring dire consequences! It is up to very important stars like you to defeat that hellkite of a villain.

t_ch: 这些蕉师都是由代理校长「蕉授」任命的，不必我多说，去校长室问个清楚吧。期待各位的后续情节哦。
t_en: These BananAdvisors were appointed by the acting dean, Profnana. I believe I don't have to make this any more explicit. Go to the dean's office to find the answers you seek. Oh, and keep me updated on how the plot unfolds!

t_ch: 那接下来还有我的戏份吗！
t_en: Ooh, what about my part? Do I still have any scenes coming up?

t_ch: 这位演员，你不是很想出演我的影片吗？来这里挑份剧本吧。
t_en: You're keen about appearing in my films, aren't you? Come over here and choose a script.

t_ch: 真、真的吗？太好了！
t_en: C—Can I really? Thank you so much!!!

t_ch: 加油啊，小演员，我很看好你。
t_en: Give it your best shot, fledgling actor. I see great potential in you.

t_ch: 我一定不会让您失望的！
t_en: I—I will live up to your expectations!

t_ch: 亲爱的同学们，虽然你们既没有预约也没有敲门，但还是欢迎你们蕉。
t_en: What a surprise, my dear students. Hmm, no appointment or a polite knock on the door... but, I welcome you banantheless.

t_ch: 不要再胡枝扯叶了，速速招来——阁下就是御猿•邪忍的邪祟•总长吧！
t_en: Cease the shady evasion! I urge you to come clean now! You're Evil Ninja Osaru's Fiendling Chief, aren't you!?

t_ch: 旁边的同学，能帮我翻译一下吗？
t_en: Excuse me dear student, could you help me translate that?

t_ch: 简而言之，折纸大学出现了一种模因病毒，正在大肆传播并感染学生们的心智。
t_en: The short story is that a memetic virus has broken loose in Paperfold University. It's going around infecting the students' minds as we speak.

t_ch: 蕉授，它就是「睡蕉小猴」，而散布这种病毒的正是你手下的蕉师。
t_en: Slumbernana Monkey is that virus, Profnana. And its transmission was orchestrated by none other than your BananAdvisors.

t_ch: 我还以为这堂课能拖得再久一些。
t_en: I had thought this class would last a little longer than this.

t_ch: 你的坦白比预想中更快。所以，这果然是原始博士的阴谋？
t_en: Your confession came sooner than we expected. So, is this one of Dr. Primitive's schemes?

t_ch: 阴谋？蕉蕉蕉，未免太高看匹诺康尼了。这座只剩下铜臭味的金钱乐园，怎么配得上博士崇高的人类实验？
t_en: A scheme? Bana tsk, you're thinking too highly of this place! Penacony is nothing but a cesspool of riches. It will never be worthy of the great Doctor's sublime experiments on humans!

t_ch: 这里只有我，一位「二等研究猿」，来匹诺康尼完成自己的毕业课题：基于「模因」的返祖实验。
t_en: Here, it's just me. A second class research ape working in Penacony on my graduation thesis: An atavistic experiment centered around memetic entities.

t_ch: 课题很顺利，这里的人都爱睡蕉小猴，尤其是以学生为代表的年轻人。他们将创造出新的联觉梦境「睡蕉的时刻」，并催化它成长、扩张、甚至进化……
t_en: My research is going along smoothly. People here adore Slumbernana Monkey, especially students from the youth demographic group. Soon, they'll create a new Synesthesia Dreamscape, "the Moment of Slumbernana," and foster its growth, expansion, and evolution...

t_ch: 御猿屋戕害天下苍生，只为建立一座百祟•夜行的邪恶国度？
t_en: The endless atrocities that Osaru unleashed onto the world... just to build an Evil Realm where a hundred malevolent spirits prowl at night?

t_ch: 这位同学，你的话真的很难懂，不会是在骂我吧？
t_en: Girl, I cannot begin to fathom your cryptic speech. It doesn't sound like you're speaking ill of me... Or are you?

t_ch: 也罢，庸人难以理解返祖实验的伟大。在传道解惑前，先来个随堂测验吧：同学们知道香蕉是如何繁殖的吗？
t_en: ...Never mind. Ordinary folks will never understand the great cause of our atavistic experiment. How about a pop quiz before I clarify your doubts? Who knows how bananas reproduce?

t_ch: 靠种子？
t_en: Through seeds?

t_ch: 靠传粉？
t_en: Through pollination?

t_ch: 木遁•生蕉之术！
t_en: Through Mokuton: Banana-jutsu!

t_ch: 真是糟糕的忍术。
t_en: A terrible ninjutsu.

t_ch: 为了保证口感，大多数商品香蕉都是「无性繁殖」。没有种子也没有花粉，需要用相同的根茎培育芽苗。
t_en: To maintain their taste, the majority of commercial bananas are produced through "asexual reproduction." Lacking seeds and pollen, they are grown from the same rhizome.

t_ch: 回答正确。五个琥珀纪前，博识学会培育出了一种人类自认完美的香蕉，那便是「金黄睡蕉」。
t_en: That's correct. Five Amber Eras ago, the Intelligentsia Guild cultivated a banana species that humans deemed perfect: the golden Slumbernana.

t_ch: 金黄睡蕉迅速统治了水果市场，它营养丰富、味道甜美、表皮还会散发出迷人的金色光泽，让每个星际香蕉园的夜晚都如同「黄金的时刻」一般闪耀。
t_en: The golden Slumbernana swiftly dominated the fruit market. Nutritious, sweet, and its peel gives off a mesmerizing golden sheen. It transformed every interstellar banana plantation into a spectacle akin to the Golden Hour at night.

t_ch: 但它最后灭绝了，对吗？
t_en: But it eventually became extinct, didn't it?

t_ch: 没错，只能人工繁殖的睡蕉没有进化的可能性，相同的基因赋予了它们相同的弱点。当一种致命的太空真菌随着生产线开始传播……
t_en: Exactly. Because it was cultivated by humans, the Slumbernana lacked room for evolution. Having the same set of genes also meant sharing the same vulnerabilities. And when a fatal cosmic fungus wormed its way into the production line...

t_ch: 这一统治寰宇的物种在短短几个月内便消亡了。
t_en: The same banana species that reigned over all the others of its kind was scrubbed clean from the entire cosmos in just mere months.

t_ch: 你想说，人类也是一样？
t_en: Are you saying that humans will suffer the same fate?

t_ch: 是啊，睡蕉的前身是繁殖力极强的碧绿野蕉。如果没有人为干预，它本应绽放更加多彩的光芒，就像这匹诺康尼一样。
t_en: Of course. The golden Slumbernana's predecessor was the highly reproductive jadegreen banana. If not for human intervention, it would have blossomed much more vibrantly over the years, much like Penacony as we know it.

t_ch: 但这里的人们却选择了粗劣的模仿：修筑高楼、建立都市、印刷货币，然后自愿成为宇宙市场中的一块拼图。
t_en: It's a pity those on Penacony just had to be second-rate copycats. What with constructing skyscrapers, building cities, printing currencies, and even making the decision to become like the other cogs in the cosmic marketplace.

t_ch: 就像金黄睡蕉一样，一成不变、一触即溃、最后一无是处。
t_en: Following the exact path of the golden Slumbernana, stubbornly holding onto the status quo, creating fatal vulnerabilities for themselves, and ultimately becoming useless.

t_ch: 因为它接受了错误的*蕉育*，所以博士要让误入歧途的世界变回充满潜力的胚胎，给予它们再次成长的机会，这就是返祖实验。
t_en: Having undergone a flawed Bananenlightenment, the Doctor seeks to return these misguided worlds to their embryonic potential, giving them a fresh chance to develop. This is the atavistic experiment.

t_ch: 然而在下到访过那些星系。
t_en: However, I have visited those planets.

t_ch: 在下一颗星一颗星地走过，却找不到任何能开口说话的忍者，全都是邪祟……
t_en: As I traveled from one planet to the other, a prevalent but unpalatable observation struck me: Not a single ninja could speak, they had all become fiendlings...

t_ch: 而且你又明明白白地知道，他们不是生来如此。
t_en: But I know for a fact that they were not born this way.

t_ch: 刚从你脚边爬过去的猴子，几年前还是个水手，平日里总是自己酿酒喝。
t_en: The monkey that scurried past you was once a sailor. He knew how to ferment his own wine, and would do so regularly.

t_ch: 在远处为了个果子和其他猴子打成一片的，是那颗星球上最聪明的人，他曾经知道人要怎么飞到天上去。
t_en: The one in the distance, fighting with the other monkeys over a piece of fruit, used to be the smartest person on his planet, even having the knowledge to send people soaring into the sky.

t_ch: 但从今以后，他们就只是猴子。
t_en: But from now on... they're monkeys. Just monkeys.

t_ch: 是我的错觉吗？同学，你好像学会正常的说话方式了。
t_en: Am I imagining things? Or did you learn how to speak like a normal person?

t_ch: 还是说，此情此景——让你想起从前了？
t_en: Or... could it be that this familiar scene reminded you of your past?

t_ch: 博士是天才，他的理想足够崇高，也一定能实现。但平庸者只会沉沦于不切实际的幻想，成为文明进化的赘余。
t_en: Given the Doctor's brilliant mind, his ambitions are lofty and are sure to be realized. But the commoners? Hmph, all they do is lose themselves in unrealistic fantasies, becoming an impediment to a civilization's evolutionary progress.

t_ch: 人尽其才，物尽其用。这么久了，还没学会这个知识点吗……
t_en: Whether imbued with life or not, everything ought to be used to its full potential. Ah, how long has it been now? I'm surprised that lesson hasn't stuck...

t_ch: 博士的<color=#dbc291ff>「失败品」</color>？
t_en: Doctor's <color=#dbc291ff>"failed creation"</color>?

t_ch: 你的阴谋到此为止了。
t_en: Your scheme ends here.

t_ch: 哦？知道我为什么会放任各位在校园里胡闹，甚至一步一步引导你们来这里吗？
t_en: Is that so? Ever considered why I allowed you to do as you please on campus? Even going as far as to guide you to me?

t_ch: 折纸大学就是个培养皿，丢掉也不可惜。但如果它能把实验室里的害虫一网打尽…那就是「物尽其用」。
t_en: Paperfold University is nothing more than an incubator, no great loss if discarded. But if it can eradicate the pests in the lab, then it'd be used to its full potential.

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉，时间到了，该下课了。
t_en: Bana bana! That's all I have for you. Class dismissed.

t_ch: 你在做什么，<color=#dbc291ff>忆者</color>？
t_en: Just what do you think you're doing, <color=#dbc291ff>Memokeeper</color>?

t_ch: 亲爱的制片人，您的要求已经全部完成，按照约定，请为我解除这毫无艺术细胞的{RUBY_B#模因病毒}诅咒{RUBY_E#}吧。
t_en: I've already met all your demands, dearest producer. Please hold up your end of the deal as we've agreed: Lift this abominable {RUBY_B#memetic virus}curse{RUBY_E#} that stifles my artistic expression.

t_ch: 要求？不不不，芮克先生，把那群难以*蕉化*的顽猴交出来。你才谈得上「完成了要求」。
t_en: Demands? I'm afraid not, Mr. Reca. Until you hand over those incorrigible and willful monkeys, you have not met all of my "demands".

t_ch: 这不对啊。我费尽心力帮各位混入学校，妨碍家族监视，又解决了你们最头疼的游侠，现在你还要我交出演员的所有权？
t_en: But that's not our deal! I went to great lengths to help you infiltrate the school, disrupted The Family's surveillance, and even dealt with the Ranger who was causing you the most trouble. And now you want me to give up ownership of the actors?

t_ch: 他们都是稀世罕见的好演员，还有许多留待挖掘的故事，我可不能让他们就这么杀青啊。
t_en: We're talking exceptional talents that are incredibly rare to come by! They have so many more stories waiting to be unearthed! I can't allow their journey to end here.

t_ch: 芮克先生，我没有在和你商量，我没必要和一位俘虏商量。
t_en: Mr. Reca, there is no room for negotiation here. I have no need to negotiate with a captive.

t_ch: 不出三个系统时，你也会和这群学生一样变成睡蕉小猴。不想自己的导演生涯就此结束，就乖乖把他们交出来。
t_en: If you don't acquiesce, then in less than three system hours, you'll turn into a Slumbernana Monkey like those students. Hand them over now if your directing career even means anything to you.

t_ch: NG——我拒绝！蕉授，你知道我为何会落入你们之手吗？
t_en: No, I refuse! Profnana, have you ever wondered why I ended up under your control?

t_ch: 能追查到博士的下落，算你有点本事。但偷偷摸摸跟过来还认为不会被发现，未免有些太过傲慢了？
t_en: Tracking down the Doctor's whereabouts shows you have some skill. However, believing you could follow us unnoticed was quite presumptuous, wasn't it?

t_ch: 即便以实验动物的标准，你也远远不够资质啊，*大导演*。
t_en: Even if we were to need animals for our experiment, you're nowhere near qualified... "great director."

t_ch: 可惜，我铤而走险，一心只为拍摄精彩的{RUBY_B#记忆}影片{RUBY_E#}。从一开始，我就已经做好为艺术献身的准备了，所以你的威胁毫无意义。
t_en: What a pity. I put my life on the line just so I could make this wonderful {RUBY_B#memory}film{RUBY_E#} a reality. I decided a long time ago that I'd do anything for art, so your threat means nothing to me.

t_ch: 对于剧组，开机就要承担风险，真正的导演哪怕让字幕里的名字加上示亡号，也绝不会让摄影机停下来。
t_en: Every film crew knows full well the risks they run the moment filming begins. And in turn, a dedicated director would never stop rolling the cameras, even if it meant having to insert an obelus next to a crew or cast member's name in the credits!

t_ch: 说到底，你也是一只为没用的梦想挣扎的可怜猴啊。
t_en: In the end, you too are just a pitiable monkey, struggling for worthless dreams.

t_ch: 那你就做好献身的准备吧。
t_en: Be prepared to sacrifice yourself then.

t_ch: 瞧。乱破也在这里，这下咱们和她想一块儿去了。
t_en: Look! Rappa's here too. Looks like she's thinking along the same lines as us!

t_ch: 怎么能在课堂上使用暴力啊！
t_en: You're not supposed to use violence in the classroom!

t_ch: 这是*蕉育*！暴力也是一种*蕉育*！
t_en: It's Bananenlightenment! And violence is one way to enforce that!

t_ch: 下课时间…到了……
t_en: Class... d—dismissed...

t_ch: 这下事情闹大了…一下子来了好多看热闹的人。
t_en: Looks like things blew up real quick... Everyone's flocked here to see what's going on.

t_ch: 这玩偶…简直就跟活物一样。
t_en: Does this toy... have a life of its own?

t_ch: 这个方向…是财富学院？
t_en: Isn't this the way to the Fortune Academy?

t_ch: 乱破？她什么时候跑前面去的。
t_en: Rappa? When did she get ahead of us?

t_ch: 这气氛…真的是在上营销课么？
t_en: This atmosphere... is this... really a marketing class?

t_ch: 有效果了。它似乎要带我们去什么地方，跟上吧。
t_en: It's working. It seems to be leading us somewhere. Let's catch up.

t_ch: （怎么感觉今天一直在追猴子……）
t_en: (Why does it feel like I've been on a wild monkey chase all day...)

t_ch: 是百货•忍徒和虫豸•邪祟——
t_en: It's Ninja Initiate Merchant and Fiendling Pest—

t_ch: 等等，先听听他们在说什么。
t_en: Hold on. Let's listen in on their conversation first.

t_ch: 这些蕉师绝不是普通的教职员工…你们的目的是什么？
t_en: There's no chance those BananAdvisors are actual faculty members... Just what is your goal?

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉，当然是用睡蕉小猴为人们带来幸福蕉！
t_en: Bana mwuhaha! Why, spreading joy with Slumbernana Monkey, of course!

t_ch: 有…内鬼…*蕉易*终止……
t_en: Ugh... mole... among us... Deal aborted...

t_ch: 想必这位谐乐蕉师也是幕后黑手的同僚。另外我有种预感，那位芮克先生也不简单。
t_en: Charmony BananAdvisor must be in league with the mastermind behind this. And I can't help but feel like there's more than meets the eye with Mr. Reca.

t_ch: 在下亦有同感。飞龙•忍者果真心思缜密。
t_en: I concur with you. Ninja Hiryū is a punctilious ninja indeed.

t_ch: 你们这些差生注定不能成才，还是乖乖享受睡蕉小猴的幸福吧！
t_en: Hopeless students like you are destined to be nothing! Just accept Slumbernana Monkey's grace of a happy life!

t_ch: 注定？多么可笑。「忍者的利刃并非不能斩断因果，不如说，我等必须斩断因果！」
t_en: ...Destined? Hmmph, all nonsense! "The ninja's blade can and must sever the chain of cause and effect!"

t_ch: 对…对！「厉鬼啊，在我们的忍法面前化作飞烬吧！」
t_en: R-Right! "Evil spirit, be reduced to ashes before our ninjutsu!"

t_ch: 不及格…我也…不及格……
t_en: Fail... I... also failed...

t_ch: 天守阁对峙的时刻到了，危情刻不容缓，各位请用上自己的忍•脚步吧。
t_en: A castle showdown looms ahead of us, fellow ninjas. We ought to make haste with ninja speed.

t_ch: 「仇恨是一切弱者的弱点」。
t_en: "Hatred is the frailty of the weak."

t_ch: 他香蕉的…又来了？
t_en: Fudgin' banana... That line again!?

t_ch: 这就是我从睡蕉小猴身上学到的一切……
t_en: And that is everything that Slumbernana Monkey taught me...

t_ch: 仔细想想吧，诸位，我们所感受到的欢欣、悲伤、灵光一闪…它们近乎全部依赖于这副身体中，化学物质的微妙变化。
t_en: Think about this, everyone: The emotions we experience, be it joy, sadness, or an epiphany... every one of them is produced from a subtle shift in chemical composition within this vessel of ours.

t_ch: 略施手段，它们就会产生、消逝，你甚至能让自己在短时间内性情大变。
t_en: With some manipulation, we should be able to easily create or erase emotions. That means triggering a sudden change in your own temperament isn't out of the question!

t_ch: 所以，这就是我的结论了：任何深思熟虑的行为，并不比「跳起来」这个简单的动作高级多少。
t_en: So here's my conclusion: Even if a behavior is generated after thorough deliberation, it is no more sophisticated than the simple act of "jumping."

t_ch: …什么屁话。
t_en: ...What a load of horse manure.

t_ch: 我去别的地方看看。
t_en: I'm checkin' somewhere else.

t_ch: 好哦…哎，等等？
t_en: Mm-hmm... Huh? Wait!

t_ch: 你要去哪，好不容易把你内推进来，别再做惹眼的事啦。至少…别再掏枪指着别人？
t_en: Where are you going? It wasn't easy to get in, so don't do anything that'll draw unnecessary attention. At least... stop pointing your gun at people?

t_ch: 多谢了，无名客姐们。没想到你在这话语权还挺大——星穹列车开拓到猴子身上了？
t_en: Appreciate it, Nameless gal. You have quite the authority 'round here, eh? Has the Astral Express begun to take on monkeys?

t_ch: 我也不想那么有天赋嘛。但助蕉非说本姑娘是个优秀人才，一上来就给我发了级别很高的社员证……
t_en: I wasn't expecting that either, but the Assistananas insist I'm a great talent. They even gave me a membership card with a high level of clearance...

t_ch: 呃，在主张放弃思考的社团很有天赋？
t_en: ...Wait, talented for a club that advocates the abandonment of all thought!?

t_ch: 也没说错吧？姐们，刚才你听得都走不动道了。
t_en: Ain't wrong, am I? You were so darn mesmerized by their speech back there.

t_ch: 听听而已嘛，我又没信。他们说话都不押韵，肯定不靠谱。
t_en: Well... I was just listening to what they had to say. It's not like they managed to convince me anyway. Plus, if they don't talk in rhyme, it's probably just nonsense.

t_ch: 所以…你是怎么找到这的？总不能是因为喜欢小猴吧。
t_en: So, what brought you here? You don't look like you're a fan of these monkeys.

t_ch: 是啊，他香蕉的，巡海游侠都这样，见到猴子就恨不得翻个跟头。
t_en: Why not? Galaxy Rangers are forkin' monkey fans. We go bananas at the mere sight of them.

t_ch: 所以…这位先生其实是在追查什么通缉犯吗？难怪穿得像个警长……
t_en: So... He's on the hunt for some kind of fugitive? That explains why he's dressed like a sheriff...

t_ch: 啊，没有没有。其实…他自己就是通缉犯？
t_en: Ah, no, no. I guess... you could say he IS a fugitive?
...Wh—What?

t_ch: 你慢慢跟她解释吧。我先自己转一圈。
t_en: Yada yada, tell her my life story then. I'm gonna go check the place out.

t_ch: 没事啦，他只是看上去凶巴巴的。听丹恒说，他动不动就喵喵叫呢。
t_en: Aww, there's nothing to be afraid of! He just looks a little scary, but Dan Heng says he's more bark than bite.

t_ch: 哎呀…这位朋友，你还真是冒昧。
t_en: Ah my friend... you really are bold.

t_ch: 你怎么知道我弄到了一张超级稀有的「蕉版卡」？还是烫金卡面！
t_en: How'd you find out I got my hands on an ultra rare BanaCard? Look, it's even embossed in gold!

t_ch: 哥们，有病是吧？
t_en: Hey brother, you ain't right in the head.

t_ch: 还真让你说着啦，自从有了它，我可是茶不思饭不想……
t_en: You're right. Ever since I got it, I haven't been able to think of anything else...

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
t_en: Bananana! Bananana!

t_ch: 半个奇怪的地方都没有——这可真香蕉的怪。
t_en: Not a single thing around here makes sense — this is downright bananas.

t_ch: 无名客姐们，借一步说话？
t_en: Hey, Nameless gal. Can we have a little talk over yonder?

t_ch: 借一步？有什么不能在这聊的……
t_en: Just me? Why can't we just talk here...?

t_ch: 啊…没关系的，三月同学，你们先聊吧。我去那边等你。
t_en: Um, it's okay. You guys go ahead. I'll wait for you over there, March.

t_ch: 尽管语气一如往常，但匆匆跑远时，蒙塔娜的神情中仍带着几分紧张……
t_en: Although her tone is normal, there was still a hint of nervousness in Montana's expression as she hurriedly ran off...

t_ch: 瞧你，我才刚哄好呢。
t_en: What are you up to? I only just convinced her everything's fine, you know...

t_ch: 不然呢，真把哥们当哥们了？
t_en: Awful chummy with someone you just met, ain'tcha friendo?

t_ch: 别装了，大名鼎鼎的无名客，你们那边进展如何，什么时候盯上原始博士的？
t_en: Alright, great Nameless one, drop the act already. What's the deal on your side? When did you guys start layin' eyes on Dr. Primitive?

t_ch: 原始博士…？
t_en: Dr. Primitive...?

t_ch: 咳咳，是啊，来交换下情报吧，你先！
t_en: Ahem. Oh yeah, that's right. Let's swap intel then. You first!

t_ch: 想讲清楚原始博士的事迹并不需要太多时间……
t_en: It doesn't take much time to tell Dr. Primitive's stories...

t_ch: 原来…果然是这样啊，不出所料。
t_en: Oh, I see... Uh-huh, exactly as we suspected.

t_ch: 那你在流梦礁查到什么没？
t_en: So, did you find anything at Dreamflux Reef?

t_ch: 什么都没有，但无所谓。这种事我见得多了，解决办法也只有一种。都是见过大场面的人，用不着我多说了吧？
t_en: There ain't a thing here, but who cares. Seen this plenty of times, and there's only one solution. We've all rid this rodeo, so I reckon I don't need to spell it out.

t_ch: 喔，我懂你意思。
t_en: Uhm, yes. I totally agree.

t_ch: 痛快，好……
t_en: Sweet. Alright then...

t_ch: 准备把这儿砸了吧！/带我成为高级社员。
t_en: Prepare to tear this place apart! / Help me become a high-ranking member.

t_ch: 呃…我只是想开个玩笑，怎么你还开了个更大的？
t_en: Uh... I was just trying to make a joke, but you took it even further?

t_ch: 这不是个香蕉玩笑！换成公司狗，我现在就让他们排队等枪毙。
t_en: You're rufflin' my bananas now. That wasn't a joke! If it were the IPC lackeys, I'd have them lined up right this instant for a one-way ticket to other side!

t_ch: 但这地转来转去净是些孩子，让我为难他们？原始博士没少干过推人当靶子的烂事，类似的套中一次就够了。
t_en: But they only planted kids in this place. I can't be using my ways on them. It's not the first time Dr. Primitive's used others as scapegoats. I ain't gonna step on the same rake twice.

t_ch: 可你现在不还是在往陷阱里跳嘛。
t_en: But aren't you doing that right now? Falling for the trap.

t_ch: 哈，见过手枪炸膛吗？只要能用对时候，强过给人一梭子。
t_en: Hah, ever seen a squib load? When timed right, it's more effective than unloadin' a full clip.

t_ch: 我是不知道这社团背后到底是什么香蕉，但从流梦礁的杂音来看，它肯定对这地方很感兴趣。咱们真动手，它坐不住的。
t_en: I got no clue what kinda monkey business this club's up to, but I know from the static noise at Dreamflux Reef that they're sure as heck interested in Penacony. They'll definitely step in if we raise the roof offa this place.

t_ch: 如果你没有其他法子，就按我说的做吧，优秀会员。
t_en: Unless you've gotta better idea you can think of, then let's do it my way, star member.

t_ch: 唔，倒也有个主意。总之你先别急，咱们再去会会蒙塔娜——记得要温柔点啊。
t_en: Hmm, I do have an idea... sort of. Just hold your horses. Let's go back and meet Montana first. Remember — be nice!

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉——
t_en: Bana, bana, bana—!

t_ch: 怎么跑了，我也想逗逗。
t_en: Why did it run off? Aww, I wanted to play with it too!

t_ch: 三月同学，你可算来啦。
t_en: March, you're finally back!

t_ch: 正好正好，重新介绍一下。他叫波提欧，之前有些误会啦，其实他很友善的。
t_en: Yeah! Let's do this again — the right way. This is Boothill. You guys started off on the wrong foot. He's actually a really nice person.

t_ch: 没事啦，我后来又想了想，匹诺康尼人来人往，出现什么样的人都不该大惊小怪才是。
t_en: Oh, don't worry about me. I thought about it earlier. Penacony sees a ton of visitors and transiting travelers. It's only normal to meet people of all sorts of background here.

t_ch: 是啊，我都有那么几次被通缉…不对，十几次？算了。
t_en: Yeah, I was wanted on a few occasions too... Ehe, maybe a dozen times? Never mind, that's not important now.

t_ch: 还是说正事吧。你说睡蕉社今天有大人物的讲座，怎么样，我们赶上了吗？
t_en: Let's talk about the Slumbernana Association. There's an important seminar scheduled for today, right? Are we in time for that?

t_ch: 你又搞错了，三月同学，可比讲座厉害多了！真要说…那可是「显圣」。
t_en: Oh, March! You remembered wrong again. This is far grander than a seminar! I guess... you can call it a theophany?

t_ch: 接下来，我们能见到「真正的睡蕉小猴」。
t_en: In just a bit, we'll get to see the actual Slumbernana Monkey in the flesh.

t_ch: 他香蕉的，这玩意还有盗版？
t_en: Holy bananas... There are rip-offs of this thing?

t_ch: 不是不是，睡蕉小猴几乎是在一夜间爆火的，对于它的起源，人们众说纷纭。
t_en: Haha, that's not it. Slumbernana Monkey went viral overnight, but people have different opinions on how the fad began.

t_ch: 但无论如何，唯一的源头肯定存在，我们马上就能见到了——没有被胡乱加上各种定义，回归本真的睡蕉小猴。
t_en: No matter what people choose to believe, there has to be a Slumbernana Monkey that started it all, and we're about to see it! The original Slumbernana Monkey in all its unfiltered glory, free from all sorts of stereotypes.

t_ch: 没听懂，但应该很厉害吧。
t_en: I'm not quite following, but it sounds impressive, I guess.

t_ch: 校园里也有参加过前几次显圣的学生。
t_en: We have a few other students from campus who attended a few theophanies before.

t_ch: 他们是怎么说的？
t_en: What did they say about it?

t_ch: 什么都没说。但他们看起来…嗯，像是去过了世界的尽头。
t_en: Nothing, really. But they had this look... Um, like they'd been to the world's end.

t_ch: 他们无一例外都变得非常幸福，看起来真令人羡慕。
t_en: Every single one of them looked like they were in a state of absolute bliss. I want to feel like that too.

t_ch: 这倒是有意思，我非得会会它不可。还得一会儿是吧？
t_en: Well, ain't that somethin'. I reckon I gotta see it myself. Still got a bit to wait, huh?

t_ch: 嘿，哥们——
t_en: Hey there, pal—

t_ch: 蕉…蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana... Bana bana...

t_ch: 很难形容出对方在人群中究竟有何不同——他看了过来，眼神中的清澈令人惊叹。
t_en: It's hard to describe what exactly sets him apart in the crowd — he looked over, and the clarity in his eyes was astonishing.

t_ch: 这个人似乎不准备给出任何回应。
t_en: It seems this person isn't planning to respond.

t_ch: 嘿，没瞎吧？
t_en: Hey, you can see me, right?

t_ch: 蕉…蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana... Bana bana...

t_ch: 对这种毫无来由的冒犯，对方袒露出笑意，然后不再言语。
t_en: In response to this unprovoked offense, she revealed a smile and then fell silent.

t_ch: 怎么，看个电视麻烦成这样？
t_en: What's this now, watchin' TV gotta be this complicated?

t_ch: 啊，你又回来啦。
t_en: Oh, you're back.

t_ch: 这就是蒙塔娜说的显圣，说是什么…见到睡蕉小猴的唯一方法，就是和助蕉链接起来。
t_en: This is the theophany that Montana told us about. The only way to see Slumbernana Monkey is apparently through forming some kind of connection with the Assistanana.

t_ch: 久等了。哦，又多了一位想见睡蕉小猴的社员吗？
t_en: Thank you for waiting. Oh, another member hoping to see Slumbernana Monkey?

t_ch: 不，是只有我。
t_en: No, not her. Just me.

t_ch: 噫——又想浑水摸鱼，不够了解睡蕉小猴可是链接不上的哦。
t_en: Tsk, trying to worm your way in again, huh? But you won't be able to establish a connection if you know nothing about Slumbernana Monkey~

t_ch: 这位先生…虽然看着很陌生，但应该不是普通的社员吧？
t_en: You... look unfamiliar. But you don't seem like a regular member either.

t_ch: 没错，你们说我很有天分。
t_en: That's right. Been told I'm quite talented.

t_ch: 嗯？什么很有天分……
t_en: Huh? What talent do you have...?

t_ch: 我是能人级会员，编号<unbreak>244</unbreak>，三月七。
t_en: I'm Denisovan <unbreak>244</unbreak>, March 7th.

t_ch: 啊！原来是您，早有耳闻，您有潜力成为真正迈入本源的人，请到我身边来吧。
t_en: Oh, it's you! Yes, I've heard about you. You have the potential to truly reach the source. Please, come over to me.

t_ch: 等等，你在做什么啊？
t_en: Not so fast! What are you up to this time?

t_ch: 脑子不好的人接招，脑子清醒的人还击。
t_en: The dimmer of us two plays the bait, the other get ready to fight.

t_ch: 帮我在外面守着。
t_en: Keep watch outside.

t_ch: 喂，等等——
t_en: Hey, wait—!

t_ch: 喂——喂——这么快？
t_en: Hey—! Hellooo! That was fast...?

t_ch: 真的假的，难道他真的很有天分？
t_en: Really now? So he's actually talented?
Bam—

t_ch: 可惜的是，痛觉尚在——无论何时何地，都最适合用来唤回某人的痛觉，此刻尚在。
t_en: Unfortunately, the sense of pain remains — whenever and wherever, it's appropriate to use it to bring someone back to their senses.

t_ch: 喂，醒醒——醒醒啊——
t_en: Hey, wake up... Wake up...

t_ch: 赶上了！你没有被变成那样！
t_en: Phew, I made it in time! Thank goodness you didn't end up like that!

t_ch: 这…怎么了……
t_en: Wh—What happened...?

t_ch: 没时间解释了，快来帮忙！
t_en: No time to explain. Hurry, I need your help!

t_ch: 我去把蒙塔娜也叫醒，动作快点——
t_en: I'll go wake Montana. Hurry!
...Huh?

t_ch: 等等——
t_en: Wait—!

t_ch: 这到底是……
t_en: What's going on...?

t_ch: 这是恩典，无名客小姐。
t_en: This is my grace, Miss Nameless.

t_ch: 而你这位游侠朋友，你亲手打断了他获得幸福的过程。
t_en: As for your Ranger friend though, you just single-handedly destroyed his path to happiness.

t_ch: 别过来，站那儿别动。
t_en: Stay where you are. Don't come any closer.

t_ch: 当然，诉诸武力并非我的目的，我来此是为了「证明」，而非征服。
t_en: Naturally, resorting to violence is not my intention. I'm only here to prove something, not to subjugate.

t_ch: 证明…什么？
t_en: Prove... what?

t_ch: 证明我的观点……
t_en: To prove that my viewpoint...

t_ch: 顺应人们的渴望。
t_en: ...is in line with the desires of humans.

t_ch: 蒙塔娜？
t_en: Montana?

t_ch: 三月七…你这是要干什么？
t_en: March 7th... What are you trying to do?

t_ch: 不是吧…蒙塔娜，你还没搞清楚情况吗？你身后那是个坏家伙啊！
t_en: Gosh... Montana! Don't you see what's going on? The bad guy's the one behind you!

t_ch: 你…怎么能这么说？我还以为你也是真心喜欢睡蕉小猴的……
t_en: H—How could you say that? And here I thought you loved Slumbernana Monkey from the bottom of your heart...

t_ch: 你…你……
t_en: Y—You...
...Bana?

t_ch: 蒙塔娜……
t_en: Oh, Montana...

t_ch: 呃，我说……
t_en: Uh, I think—

t_ch: 赶紧离开这儿，快！
t_en: Let's get out of this place now, hurry!

t_ch: 请便吧，我期待您为我的证明补上最后的一环。
t_en: As you wish. I look forward to you providing the last link in my proof.

t_ch: 真有病！
t_en: You're a sicko!

t_ch: 蕉蕉蕉……
t_en: Bana bana bana...

t_ch: 搞什么鬼啊，怎么还主动拦路？
t_en: What's your problem! Why are you blocking our way!?

t_ch: 您想要离开当然无所谓。可是，您怎么能擅自带走我的观察样本呢？
t_en: You're free to leave, if you wish. But not with my subject. He's still under observation.

t_ch: 观察样本？
t_en: Your subject?

t_ch: 没错，肉体经由改造，异于常人，无法在物质层面经受退化。心性坚如钢铁，绝不动摇，能将任何腐蚀嗤之以鼻。
t_en: Mm-hmm. Unlike typical humans, his modified body is impervious to physical deterioration. With a steely grit and determination that never wavers, he can easily resist all forms of corruption.

t_ch: 这样一位巡海游侠…我能让他变成什么样子，这非常值得观察。
t_en: Ah, a Galaxy Ranger like him... It'll be worthwhile to see what I can turn him into.

t_ch: 我猜您之所以畏首畏尾，只想立刻求援，是认定这些由人类转变而来的小猴在失去心智后，是由我控制的。
t_en: Let me guess. You want to call for help right away because you're convinced these monkeys, formerly humans who have lost their minds, are under my command.

t_ch: 既然如此，您又凭什么认为…自己真的唤醒了那位游侠呢？
t_en: If that's the case, why do you believe... that you really woke up the Ranger?

t_ch: 呃，不是吧……
t_en: Uh, that can't be right...

t_ch: 巡海游侠先生，麻烦你了，向这位小姐开枪吧。
t_en: Mr. Galaxy Ranger, would you please fire a shot at this young lady?
Hey—!

t_ch: 在匆忙转身时，她已经做好了最坏的打算，就算看见一只睡蕉小猴端着枪对自己扣动扳机，她也不会太过惊讶。
t_en: As she turns in a hurry, she's already prepared for the worst. She wouldn't be too surprised even if she sees a Slumbernana Monkey aiming a gun at her and pulling the trigger.

t_ch: 然而波提欧给出的回应，还是远远地超出了她的想象——
t_en: However, Boothill's response is far beyond her expectations —

t_ch: 可是，这位先生，杀人可是犯法的，更何况是对着这么一位美丽的女士？
t_en: But sir, killin' folks is against the law, especially when it's a lovely lady like her.

t_ch: 伴随着从未听闻过的语调，呈现在三月七面前的，是一副在忆域中才有可能出现的奇景。
t_en: Accompanied by an unusual tone of voice, what appears before March 7th is a fantastical scene that can only exist in the realm of memories.

t_ch: 呃…该不会现在，我变成主角了吧？因为这把枪？
t_en: I'm the star of the show now? All 'cause of this here gun?

t_ch: 它看着是不错，但用它取了谁的命？我可没这意思。
t_en: It's a nice gun alright. But using it to take a life? I have no such intention.

t_ch: 要不，两位的恩怨自行解决，我先走一步？
t_en: How about the two of you settle your own scores, while I'll be on my way?
You...

t_ch: 等等，你想让我见证的就是这个？
t_en: Wait a minute... Is this what you wanted me to see?

t_ch: 没错，你应该也猜得到，毕竟只是一场空梦，即便在梦中变成猴子，人们在现实中的身体，也不会产生生理性的退化。
t_en: That's. Right. ...This is merely a hollow dream, so even if they turned into monkeys here, their physical bodies in the real world will not be subjected to any biological deterioration.

t_ch: 而他，凭借自己坚韧无比的心智，成为了更加可贵的样本。他的心智没有被彻底毁灭，反而……
t_en: The Ranger's extraordinarily staunch and unyielding mind made him an even more valuable specimen to be studied. His mind hasn't been completely wiped out, instead...

t_ch: …站在这里的既不是一只猴子，也不是一位巡海游侠。
t_en: ...he is neither a monkey, nor is he a Galaxy Ranger.

t_ch: 而是多年以前，家乡仍未被毁于一旦时，无忧无虑地生活在草原上的他，一个「过去的波提欧」。
t_en: He's a young Boothill, one from many years back. Back when his homeland hadn't been ravaged, when he lived as a carefree child in the grasslands.

t_ch: 「不完全的退化」…这十分有趣。
t_en: A partial regression... How very interesting indeed.

t_ch: 依照记忆推算，这副模样距离他第一次对着土匪扣动扳机，至少还差着十年光阴。
t_en: If memory serves, this version of him is at least ten years removed from the older Boothill when he first fired a shot at a bandit.

t_ch: 多么神奇啊，无论是这美梦剧团，还是我本尊，他只需一枪就能了结。
t_en: Miraculous... Be it the Sweet Dreams Troupe or myself, he can end it all with just one shot.

t_ch: 但扣动扳机的力量…偏偏来自心灵，而非血肉之躯。现在，他不过是个孩子，偏偏就不懂如何开出这一枪。
t_en: But it just so happens that the decision to pull the trigger has to be made by his soul rather than his body. The child version of him now is completely incapable of firing his own gun.

t_ch: 好了，牛仔先生，请到这里来吧。现在我们来完成你最后的课题——
t_en: Alright, Mr. Cowboy, come to me. Let's finish your final lesson now...

t_ch: 一个站在原始博士这边的巡海游侠，一位经由培养而诞生的背叛者…这值得再多写几篇论文。
t_en: A Galaxy Ranger that stands on the side of Dr. Primitive, a traitor born from nurture... this warrants several more research papers.
...Dreams?

t_ch: 喂，千万别过去啊！
t_en: Hey, don't go over there!

t_ch: 安静些，小姐，请留意旁听课程时的素养。
t_en: Be quiet, young lady, and mind your manners while class is in progress.

t_ch: 我这是…在做梦吗？
t_en: Am I... dreaming?

t_ch: 当然，基于你的记忆…你最后的记忆停留在哪里？在放牧，还是在劈柴？
t_en: Yes, of course. This dream is based off your memories... What do you last remember? Were you herding? Or chopping firewood?

t_ch: 都不对，是在吃热乎乎的炖菜，怪了，我怎么睡着的？
t_en: Neither of those. I was eating some piping hot stew. That's strange... How did I fall asleep?

t_ch: 还有大把事情呢，一会儿得是被尼克踢醒了。
t_en: There's a lot of things I should be doing. I guess Nick's gonna kick me awake soon.

t_ch: 哈哈，你有很长时间没提起过这个名字了。也对，对此刻的你来说，公司所做的一切可都还是遥远的未来。
t_en: Haha, you haven't brought up that name in quite a while. But I suppose that's only right considering where you are on the timeline. For you at this point, everything the IPC does is still in a far-off future.

t_ch: 哈，在胡说八道些什么，真是个怪梦。
t_en: Hah, what a strange dream. Everything sounds like nonsense.

t_ch: 总之，你该回到现实了。感觉如何，从梦里醒来会让你觉得痛苦吗？
t_en: It doesn't matter. It's time for you to come back to reality. How does it feel? Does waking up from a dream bring you misery?

t_ch: 痛苦？当然不会！
t_en: Misery? Why, no!

t_ch: 可惜你是个梦里的人，看不见我熟悉的那片大地，它美得让你心甘情愿死在那儿。
t_en: It's a shame you're stuck in a dream, can't lay eyes on the land I love. It's so gorgeous, you'd be willin' to die right there.

t_ch: 想不到你年纪轻轻，竟会用上这种比喻。
t_en: It's hard to believe someone so young would use that kind of analogy.

t_ch: 这可不奇怪，人总得学着安慰自己，其中就包括怎么看淡生死。
t_en: Ain't nothin' strange about that, people gotta find ways to soothe their souls, part of that is comin' to terms with life and death.

t_ch: 阿尔冈-阿帕歇有句俗话：「死亡是最公平的爱护」。
t_en: There's a saying from Aeragan-Epharshel: "Death is the fairest form of grace."

t_ch: 对于老好人，死亡能保全他的高洁。对于狡诈恶徒，死亡会干脆利落地结束一切。
t_en: For the good-hearted, death keeps their purity intact. For the cunning scoundrels, death ends things clean and quick.

t_ch: 这样啊。也就是说，你并不害怕死亡？那么请向我伸出手吧。
t_en: I see. Does that mean you're not afraid of death? If so, please extend your hand out for me.

t_ch: 想来，你一定愿意将这种「最公平的爱护」播撒到宇宙的每一个角落去……
t_en: I suppose you're perfectly willing to apply the "fairest form of grace" to every corner of the universe?

t_ch: 以原始博士的名义。
t_en: In the name of Dr. Primitive, that is.

t_ch: 这就是最后的教导了，我会让你彻底领会他的哲学。
t_en: This is my final lesson for you. You shall thoroughly understand his philosophy.

t_ch: 而一颗星星，也将就此…可怜地熄灭。
t_en: And with that, a star will pitifully fizzle out.

t_ch: 没问题，老师。不过我还有一件事想说……
t_en: No problem, Teacher. But there's something else I have to tell you...

t_ch: 我担心自己打不准，但既然抓住了你，那就不会了。
t_en: I was worried about missing my shot... but now that I've gotten ahold of you, I reckon I won't.
...What!?

t_ch: 这…怎么可能…「退化」明明已经发生了……
t_en: H—How's this possible...? The regression should've occurred already...

t_ch: 呼…知道吗，刚才我还一直担心自己搞错了呢！
t_en: Phew... Wanna know something? I was worried I had it all wrong just now!

t_ch: 但现在没问题了，恶徒死前才会问「为什么」。
t_en: But now, there ain't no problem, 'cause only an evildoer asks "why" before he dies.

t_ch: 我可不聋啊。你们聊那么大声的时候，就没想过我分得清善恶？
t_en: I ain't deaf, alright? While you were yappin' so loud, did it ever cross your mind I could tell good from evil?

t_ch: 还真像尼克说的一样，复仇不用找借口，就像世界上只有一件事不用学——
t_en: It's as Nick said: Revenge needs no excuses, just like how there's one thing in the world that doesn't need to be taught...

t_ch: 那就是对着坏人开枪。
t_en: Taking a shot at bad guys.

t_ch: 怎么会这样…你明明还只是个孩子……
t_en: How did things take such a turn...? You're just a child...

t_ch: 就算是天生坏种，第一次做这种事…也该有心理负担……
t_en: Even for someone born with a bad nature, the first time doing something like this should weigh heavily on their conscience...

t_ch: 是么？那我想你误会了一点。
t_en: Is that so? Well, I reckon you got that wrong.

t_ch: 有那么一种本能，满手杀债的通缉犯有，从没开过枪的牛仔小子也有，二者没有任何区别……
t_en: Be it a wanted criminal with the blood of many on their hands or a young cowboy who's never fired a gun, both share a common instinct in every sense of the word...

t_ch: ——那就是向着邪恶开火，宝贝！
t_en: ...And that's to put a bullet in anything evil, muddle-fudger!

t_ch: 这就是死的另一件好事，管你有什么苦衷和理念，我都犯不着浪费时间听。
t_en: That's another good thing about dyin'. Whatever your excuses and ideas are, I ain't gotta waste time listenin' to 'em.

t_ch: 啊，这…我算来晚了吗？
t_en: Oh. Uh... Am I late?

t_ch: 你是说已经结束的事，还是现在才要开始的事？
t_en: You referrin' to what's finished, or what's only just beginnin'?

t_ch: 现在才要开始？啊…对哦，得去找人帮忙才行，还得抓紧时间帮你看看脑子。
t_en: The one that's about to begin? Oh... right! I should go get help. You need to get your head checked, like, right now.

t_ch: 看什么脑子？他宝贝的……
t_en: Get my head checked? What in forkin' hell...
...Huh?
